title: The Job Of Looking For A Job
description: By Pastor Murianu It happened to me as a school certificate holder and thereafter no more- I get called for jobs by God and by man, why? 1. I leveraged at first on connection, divine first then human
html:
By Pastor Murianu

It happened to me as a school certificate holder and thereafter no more- I get called for jobs by God and by man, why?

1. I leveraged at first on connection, divine first then human

2. I moved from unskilled to skilled

3. I studied professional course, rare and could be self-established

4. I engaged in continuous professional development, always on the cutting edge

5. As a clergy, I studied to show myself approved

6. I made myself visible through service even when not getting paid for it

7. I move close to achievers in my chosen or desired field, helping them to achieve the more thereby tapping into the power of positive influence

8. I always ensure there is a well-developed alternative at any point in time, even now

9. I get creative, never waiting for opportunities but create them, I have multi-dimensional trainings

10. I am not lazy, I know hard work is the only antidote to hard life

11. So jobs look for me.
